query: low resolution pixelated mosaic blocky digital image
message: sub:digital_artifacts/pixelation — anti_aesthetic — pixel mosaic, blocky low-res, color-cell grids

response.objective_caption: Angular planes and geometric surfaces arranged in a layered configuration suggesting an architectural interior or built environment, viewed from an oblique perspective. Recessed areas, intersecting walls, and openings are distributed across the frame in distinct regions of magenta, cyan, green, yellow, purple, and black.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photographic image of fragmented architectural planes and geometric structures in an oblique view, deliberately overwhelmed by extreme digital artifacts including heavy pixelation, compression blockiness, and datamoshing-style corruption. Aggressive chromatic aberration pulls colors apart along the edges of angular forms, while toxic neon magentas, cyans, acid greens, and yellows clash in disharmonious combinations across the frame, dissolving walls, floors, and recessed openings into shimmering digital ambiguity.
